Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class KnowledgeSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.KnowledgeSettings
public class KnowledgeSettings extends Metadata

Java class for KnowledgeSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="KnowledgeSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="answers" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}KnowledgeAnswerSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="cases" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}KnowledgeCaseSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultLanguage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableChatterQuestionKBDeflection" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCreateEditOnArticlesTab" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableExternalMediaContent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableKbStandardSharing" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableKnowledge" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableKnowledgeAgentContribution" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableKnowledgeAnswersPromotion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableKnowledgeArticleTextHighlights" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableKnowledgeCaseRL" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableKnowledgeKeywordAutoComplete" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableKnowledgeTitleAutoComplete" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLightningKbAutoLoadRichTextField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLightningKnowledge" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="languages" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}KnowledgeLanguageSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showArticleSummariesCustomerPortal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showArticleSummariesInternalApp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showArticleSummariesPartnerPortal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="showValidationStatusField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="suggestedArticles" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}KnowledgeSuggestedArticlesSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="votingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
